narratives.title: The Old Gate
narratives.story: Legend speaks of a forgotten treasure hidden deep within the ancient fortress. Many have entered, few have returned. Bruce stands before the crumbling gates, torch in hand, ready to uncover the secrets within...

narratives.title: Echoing Entrance Hall
narratives.story: The moment Bruce steps inside, his footsteps echo like friendly greetings. Shiny coins sparkle on the floor like stars that fell from the sky. "Let's start collecting!" he whispers, eyes bright with excitement.

narratives.title: The Mushroom Glade
narratives.story: A secret underground garden glows with bouncy mushrooms of every color. Bruce giggles as he hops from one to another. Somewhere ahead the golden Sun Treasure is waiting — time to keep moving!

narratives.title: Coin Cascade Chamber
narratives.story: Coins tumble gently from cracks in the ceiling like a golden waterfall. Bruce catches as many as he can, laughing. Watch out for those sneaky spikes — the real treasure is still deeper!

narratives.title: Halfway Lantern Gallery
narratives.story: Five levels already! Little glowing lanterns float above Bruce like cheering friends. His backpack jingles with coins and trophies. "We're halfway to the Sun Treasure!" he cheers.

narratives.title: Crystal Reflection Pool
narratives.story: A shallow pool mirrors beautiful blue crystals hanging above. Bruce sees a hundred versions of himself waving back. He collects floating coins and tiptoes past the pointy surprises.

narratives.title: The Singing Statues
narratives.story: Old stone statues hum a quiet, happy tune when Bruce walks by. He hums along while gathering shiny trophies. The music says the Sun Treasure is getting closer!

narratives.title: Velvet Moss Corridor
narratives.story: Soft green moss covers the walls and floor like a giant cozy blanket. Bruce loves the squishy feeling under his feet. Coins hide in the moss — perfect for a quick treasure grab!

narratives.title: Firefly Guiding Path
narratives.story: Hundreds of tiny fireflies form a sparkling trail ahead. "Follow us, Bruce!" they seem to wink. He collects mushrooms and coins while the golden glow grows brighter.

narratives.title: Dungeon Champion Hall
narratives.story: Ten brave levels conquered! A huge stone carving shows a hero very much like Bruce holding a shining sun. "That's going to be me soon!" he says, grinning from ear to ear.

narratives.title: The Clockwork Garden
narratives.story: Tiny brass flowers open and close with soft clicks. Coins rest inside some petals like morning dew. Bruce carefully picks them while dodging the occasional wiggly spike.

narratives.title: Rainbow Stalactite Sky
narratives.story: Colorful stalactites drip light like a rainbow rain. Bruce walks under them in wonder, collecting every dropped coin. The Sun Treasure feels almost close enough to touch!

narratives.title: The Friendly Bat Choir
narratives.story: A ceiling full of bats sings a silly, bouncy song when Bruce claps. He claps back and dances while grabbing trophies. The music makes every step feel lighter.

narratives.title: Golden Gear Workshop
narratives.story: Old machines made of gold gears still turn slowly. Coins fall like confetti when Bruce passes. He catches them and keeps moving toward the warm light ahead.

narratives.title: Hero’s Fifteen Triumph
narratives.story: Fifteen levels of pure adventure! Bruce’s collection of trophies is huge. The walls almost seem to cheer when he walks by. The Sun Treasure is shining brighter than ever.

narratives.title: The Whispering Vine Tunnel
narratives.story: Glowing vines curl along the walls and whisper "Good job, Bruce!". He smiles big, collects lots of coins, and steps carefully around the tricky spike patches.

narratives.title: Starlight Observatory
narratives.story: Tiny painted stars cover the domed ceiling. Bruce feels like he’s outside at night even though he’s deep underground. Trophies sparkle here like little constellations.

narratives.title: Bouncing Bubble Cavern
narratives.story: Giant colorful bubbles float slowly — and they bounce! Bruce hops from one to another collecting coins. He laughs when he almost floats right over a poison spot.

narratives.title: The Ancient Gold Library
narratives.story: Books made of golden pages show pictures of brave treasure hunters. Bruce studies them, then collects real coins and mushrooms. The Sun Treasure is calling louder!

narratives.title: Sunrise is Near
narratives.story: Twenty levels of courage! The dungeon feels warmer with every step. Bruce can almost feel the Sun Treasure’s glow on his face. One big push left, hero!

narratives.title: Jellybean Jewel Vault
narratives.story: Shiny gemstones look exactly like giant jellybeans. Bruce pretends to taste them (just kidding!). He gathers the real coin treasures and bounces onward.

narratives.title: The Dancing Shadow Hall
narratives.story: Torches make Bruce’s shadow dance wildly on the walls. He dances too while collecting trophies. Even the spikes seem to sway — but Bruce is quicker!

narratives.title: Midnight Sun Garden
narratives.story: Flowers glow like tiny suns even in the dark. Bruce feels extra warm and brave. He collects every shining coin and mushroom he sees — almost there!

narratives.title: The Treasure Echo Chamber
narratives.story: Whenever Bruce shouts "I’m the best!", coins rain gently from above. He shouts a lot, catches them all, and hurries toward the golden light.

narratives.title: The Legend Awakens
narratives.story: Twenty-five levels conquered! The Sun Treasure is waking up — it knows Bruce is coming. The whole dungeon feels proud. One final adventure awaits!

narratives.title: The Hero’s Mirror Gallery
narratives.story: Every mirror shows Bruce wearing a different cool hat or cape. "I look awesome!" he says. He gathers trophies and steps confidently toward the goal.

narratives.title: The Giant’s Coin Purse
narratives.story: This huge room looks like someone dropped a giant bag of coins! Bruce swims through piles of treasure, laughing, and carefully avoids the pointy traps.

narratives.title: Final Sunrise Antechamber
narratives.story: Golden light spills from the next room. Bruce’s heart beats faster with excitement. He collects the last coins and trophies, ready for the greatest prize.

narratives.title: The Sun’s Waiting Room
narratives.story: The walls are warm and glowing softly. Bruce feels like he’s walking into a big hug. One more careful dash past the spikes and the treasure is his!

narratives.title: Heart of the Sun Vault
narratives.story: At last — the legendary Sun Treasure shines right before Bruce! It’s even more beautiful than the stories said. He takes a deep breath, smiles huge, and steps forward to claim his prize...
